scripts.gen:app: docker build -f apk.Dockerfile --platform linux/amd64 -t react-capacitor-apk . && docker run --name my_build react-capacitor-apk && docker cp my_build:/app/android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk ./output && docker rm my_build
scripts.run:backend-v1: yarn build:backend-v1; docker run -p 3555:8080 --rm --name geminiqtube-api-v1 geminiqtube-api-v1-image
scripts.run:backend-v2: yarn build:backend-v2; docker run -p 3001:3001 --rm --name geminiqtube-api-v2 geminiqtube-api-v2-image
